entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00269) awarded to LEIDOS INNOVATIONS CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00269 TO THE IDIQ CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO ADD AND EXERCISE CLIN 9039B AND ADD AND EXERCISE CLIN 11015AC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00273 TO THE OHCACCESS IDIQ CONTRACT (HSTS01-08-D-HRM010) IS TO INCREASE THE CEILING OF CLIN 10023 "FIXED PRICE AWARD FEE" FROM $162,841.63 BY $1,985.96 TO $164,827.59. ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00277 TO THE IDIQ CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO ADD AND EXERCISE THE PP&B TRANSITION FROM LEIDOS TO DELOITTE.
